message:
✨ Add copilot-setup-steps.yml for Copilot coding agent (#87)

The Copilot coding agent requires copilot-setup-steps.yml to be present
in the repo to enable issue assignment. Without this file, assigning
issues to Copilot fails with 'Forbidden'.

This sets up Python and the console sparse checkout so Copilot can
validate marketplace JSON and run the validation script.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+name: Copilot Setup Steps
+# Pre-configures the Copilot coding agent's Ubuntu VM with tools needed
+# to validate and test marketplace changes (JSON presets, themes, dashboards).
+
+on: workflow_dispatch
+
+jobs:
+  copilot-setup-steps:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+
+      - name: Checkout console (sparse, for validation)
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+        with:
+          repository: kubestellar/console
+          path: console
+          sparse-checkout: |
+            web/src/components/cards/cardRegistry.ts
+            web/src/components/cards
+            web/src/hooks
+            web/src/locales/en/cards.json
+          sparse-checkout-cone-mode: false
+
+      - name: Setup Python 3
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.12"
+
+      - name: Validate marketplace JSON
+        run: python3 scripts/validate-marketplace.py --mode full --console-path ./console || true
+
+      - name: Verify registry.json is valid JSON
+        run: python3 -m json.tool registry.json > /dev/null
